overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character running across a dark urban plaza with modern glass skyscrapers in the background. The character moves steadily forward past a large black rock formation under clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with dark terrain and modern skyline

agents.ego_description: female character running steadily across the dark plaza terrain toward the distant skyscrapers

entered.detail: tall residential towers with reflective glass facades dominating the skyline
large black geometric boulder or sculpture sitting on the plaza surface
unusually dark paved ground surface covering the open urban space
green trees lining the edge of the plaza near the building base

segments.scene_description: The character runs continuously across a dark asphalt urban plaza with modern glass skyscrapers towering in the background. A large black rock formation sits on the right side of the path, gradually passing out of view as the character moves forward through the empty open space under bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a stark urban plaza that transitions from a framed view of architectural elements to a wide, open expanse. It begins with the character running across dark asphalt, with towering glass skyscrapers dominating the background under a bright midday sun. As the character moves forward, the camera tracks past a large black rock formation on the right, which gradually recedes from view. The scene then opens further into the empty plaza, shifting the focus toward the vast, unobstructed space ahead.
